title: Classification Output
description: R12-compliant classification record produced by the Classification sub-agent. Maps every category in company-context/risk-taxonomy.yaml to a status (flagged or cleared) with a one-sentence rationale. Every category MUST appear — missing categories fail R12.

taxonomy_version.description: Content hash of the risk-taxonomy.yaml at the time of classification. Pinning the version makes the deliverable's classification reproducible even if the taxonomy is later updated.

status.description: flagged: the deliverable's subject implicates this risk category. cleared: it does not.

severity.description: Required when status=flagged. Drives Slack-response template's color and ordering: critical first, then high, medium, low.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation. For flagged: how the subject implicates this risk. For cleared: why this risk doesn't apply to this subject. Empty or generic rationales (e.g., 'N/A') fail validation.

cite_refs.description: Optional doc_ids supporting the classification (e.g., for a flagged abc_test category, cite ca-lab-2775).

categories.description: Keys are top-level category names from risk-taxonomy.yaml (e.g., 'abc_test', 'common_law_agency', 'joint_employer_flsa', 'staffing_agency_statutes'). Every key in the YAML must appear here.

missing_categories.description: Empty when R12 passes. Populated when the orchestrator runs Classification with a partial result (used during revise loops).
